cover.era_chip: 日帝 强占 · 1917 · 大同團結
cover.subtitle:
황제권은 국민에게 이양되었다,
임정의 사상적 뿌리.
cover.imagePrompt: Japanese-occupation era illustration, year 1917. ONE late-30s Korean independence scholar (Bak Eun-sik reference) — dark gray padded jacket, round wire-rimmed glasses, thinning hair pulled back, seated at a low wooden writing desk with a single oil lamp, calmly inscribing characters onto a long sheet of paper with a brush. Behind him: a single tall paper-screen window casting cold pale light. On the desk corner: a small folded map of the Russian Far East. Color: dark blue-gray + sepia + warm amber lamp light + ink-black. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

timeline.text: 헤이그 특사 실패. 외교 독립론 좌절 경험.

items.title: 주권재민 천명
items.desc: 융희제 양위로 주권 국민 이양 선언.

outro.tip_body: 심화 시험에서는 대동단결선언(1917)과 무오독립선언(1919.2)·2·8선언·기미선언의 선후 정렬, 발표 장소(연해주/만주/도쿄/한성), 국민주권·공화주의 천명이 임정의 민주공화제로 이어지는 흐름이 자주 출제.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized small unfurled scroll silhouette next to a single ink brush. LEFT: a tiny crown silhouette tipped over (suggesting end of monarchy). Cream #F2EDE3 base + sepia #8B6F3A accent + faint crimson #B23A3A line. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.
